summary: Verified iter287 close-shift isolation fix (backend + frontend). All 5 backend pytest cases passed and full frontend UX flow confirmed: top bar cashier name matches close dialog cashier name (احمد اختبار, 802,750 IQD) — NOT the admin's own lazy shift. Reports 'إغلاق الصندوق' tab shows open cashier shifts with green 'نشط' badge.

minor.issue: denomination_values.get(denom, int(denom)) at shifts_routes.py:1646 will crash with ValueError if a decimal string denomination (e.g. '0.5', '0.25') is ever sent. Not currently reachable from frontend (piastre-int denominations only) but a latent bug. Suggest int(float(denom)) or Decimal handling.

action_items: (Optional) Harden denomination parsing in close_cash_register to tolerate decimal string keys.
critical_code_review_comments: shifts_routes.py:1641-1648: hardcoded denomination_values only covers IQD dinars (250..50000). int(denom) fallback is fragile — will explode on any non-integer key sent by future clients or offline sync payloads.
seed_data_creation: Re-ran /app/backend/seed_owner_cashier_close_test.py and seed_expense_attribution_test.py (both idempotent). Note: test_close_cashier_shift_via_shift_id closes closefix-shift-cashier — re-run seed before any subsequent test that needs it as open.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fix works end-to-end. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_close_shift_isolation_iter287.py. Frontend confirmed via Playwright: (1) top-bar 'الوردية: احمد اختبار' matches dialog 'الكاشير: احمد اختبار' with total_sales=802,750; (2) Reports > 'إغلاق الصندوق' tab renders all 5 shifts today, 4 open shifts (expattr-a, expattr-b, احمد اختبار, مدير النظام) each show green 'نشط' badge with correct totals. Only latent concern: int(denom) fragile parsing in close endpoint (minor).
rca_of_the_issue: Original bug: /cash-register/summary and /close used _resolve_open_shift_for_close which picked OLDEST open shift; admin's own lazy shift (closefix-shift-owner, 79,500) predated the real cashier shift (closefix-shift-cashier, 802,750) → wrong shift shown/closed. Fix verified: (a) summary+close now accept optional shift_id (respected verbatim); (b) _resolve_open_shift_for_close deprioritizes requesting manager's own shift when no shift_id supplied; (c) summary now returns the SHIFT's cashier_name (احمد اختبار) instead of current_user's name (مدير النظام); (d) Dashboard.js passes activeShift.id to summary and cashSummary.shift_id to close. Verified independent close: closing closefix-shift-cashier left closefix-shift-owner still open with untouched 79,500 sales — no cross-close, no merging.
